nasb.text: In the twenty-seventh year of Asa king of Judah, Zimri reigned seven days at Tirzah. Now the people were camped against Gibbethon, which belonged to the Philistines.

esv.text: In the twenty-seventh year of Asa king of Judah, Zimri reigned seven days in Tirzah. Now the troops were encamped against Gibbethon, which belonged to the Philistines,

cnv.text: 猶大王亞撒第二十七年，心利在得撒作王七日。那時，眾人正在安營圍攻非利士的基比頓。

ccb.text: 亚撒做犹大王第二十七年，心利开始在得撒做王，执政仅七天。那时以色列军正在攻打非利士的基比顿城。
